svg.title: Agentic Architecture Recommender — System Design v3
svg.desc: Two-pass pipeline: Wave 0 domain agents (conditional), Wave 1 parallel + Trust and Control sequential, Wave 2 CV and Failure and Obs, Wave 3 Skeptic, Pass 1 and Pass 2 outputs.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about how the verified structured intake works')
sendPrompt('What does the coordinator do in the agentic recommender?')
sendPrompt('What do the Wave 0 domain agents do?')
g.text: Constraint brief: controls, prohibited tools, mandatory certs
Conditional — only if tenant has registered domain agents

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Orchestration agent do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Security agent focus on?')
sendPrompt('What does the Memory and State agent do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Tool and Integration agent do?')
sendPrompt('Why does Trust and Control run sequentially after Orchestration and Security?')
sendPrompt('What does the Compatibility Validator do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Failure and Observability agent cover?')
sendPrompt('What does the Skeptic agent do in the final review?')
sendPrompt('How does the user trigger Pass 2?')
